code: import React,{createContext,useContext,useState}from'react';import{jsx as _jsx}from"react/jsx-runtime";const AuthContext=/*#__PURE__*/createContext(null);function AuthProvider(_ref){let{children}=_ref;const[agentUser,setAgentUser]=useState(null);async function login(uid,password){const response=await fetch('http://localhost:5000/api/agents/login',{method:'POST',headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json'},body:JSON.stringify({uid,password})});const data=await response.json();if(!response.ok){throw new Error(data.message||data.error||'Login failed');}setAgentUser(data);}function logout(){setAgentUser(null);}return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(AuthContext.Provider,{value:{agentUser,login,logout},children:children});}function useAuth(){return useContext(AuthContext);}export{AuthContext,AuthProvider,useAuth};
